programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim does not tell Cheryl that their health insurance has been canceled after he has an argument with a claims representative.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Coach Jim turns his daughters' noncompetitive basketball team into tough, aggressive winners.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: A depressed man suffering from insomnia meets a strange soap salesman named Tyler Durden and soon finds himself living in his squalid house after his perfect apartment is destroyed. The two bored men form an underground club with strict rules and fight other men who are fed up with their mundane lives. Their perfect partnership frays when Marla, a fellow support group crasher, attracts Tyler's attention.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Two years ago, retired CIA agent Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) used his "particular set of skills" to rescue his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace), from kidnappers. Since then, Kim has been learning self-defense from her father, and Bryan has been on a personal mission to reunite with his ex-wife (Famke Janssen). In Istanbul, Bryan and his family cross paths with Murad (Rade Serbedzija), whose son died at Bryan's hand during Kim's rescue. Murad wants revenge, and he'll stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Ex-covert operative Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) and his ex-wife, Lenore (Famke Janssen), are enjoying a reconciliation when Lenore is brutally murdered. Bryan is framed for the crime and flees, with the CIA, FBI and police all in hot pursuit. For the last time, he channels his rage and particular set of skills into hunting down Lenore's real killers, taking his revenge and protecting the one important thing left in his life: his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace).

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: The wife and son of a Mexican drug lord embark on a vengeful quest to kill all those involved in his trial and imprisonment -- including Miami Detective Mike Lowrey. When Mike gets wounded, he teams up with partner Marcus Burnett and AMMO -- a special tactical squad -- to bring the culprits to justice. But the old-school cops must soon learn to get along with their new elite counterparts if they are to take down the vicious cartel that threatens their lives.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and budding actress whose futures will forever be altered by members of the Manson Family.

programme.title: Gleaming the Cube
programme.desc: A California skateboarder (Christian Slater) solves and avenges the death of his adopted Vietnamese brother.

programme.title: Squad Car
programme.desc: An accused man (Don Marlowe) helps a policeman (Paul Bryar) investigate an airplane mechanic's death and a counterfeit racket.

programme.title: Bigger Than Life
programme.desc: After schoolteacher Ed Avery (James Mason) faints and is hospitalized, doctors diagnose him with a fatal arterial illness and tell him he has a few months to live. Ed agrees to an experimental treatment with cortisone, and makes what appears to be a miraculous recovery. However, upon his return home, his wife, Lou (Barbara Rush), notices severe mood shifts in him. His friend and coworker Wally (Walter Matthau) also perceives the changes, and discovers that Ed has been abusing the cortisone.

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: Based on the Henry James story "The Turn of the Screw," a psychological thriller about a woman who takes a governess job for two orphans in a Victorian home. She begins to see what she believes are ghosts and suspects the children's bizarre behavior is the result of supernatural powers.

programme.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
programme.desc: Forty years ago, on the night they were meant to elope, Charlotte Hollis (Bette Davis) found her lover decapitated during a party, the blood on her dress leading everyone to suspect she was the murderer. Now, in 1964, Charlotte is an old recluse and must fight to keep her home. She enlists the help of her cousin Velma (Olivia de Havilland), who was there at the time of the murder. However, soon after Velma's arrival, Charlotte's mind becomes unstable, and she starts seeing her dead lover's head.

programme.title: Witchcraft
programme.desc: For generations, the Whitlocks and the Laniers have been feuding, including when Vanessa Whitlock (Yvette Rees), accused of being a witch, was buried alive centuries ago. Now Bill Lanier (Jack Hedley) wants to dig up a burial ground for development purposes, and Morgan Whitlock (Lon Chaney Jr.) tries to stop him. Soon, unexplainable accidents start to happen to members of the Lanier family, throwing suspicion on Morgan. The real truth Bill discovers is much more sinister than he expected.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: When a devious plot separates CIA agent Peter Sandza (Kirk Douglas) from his son, Robin (Andrew Stevens), the distraught father manages to see through the ruse. Taken because of his psychic abilities, Robin is being held by Ben Childress (John Cassavetes), who is studying people with supernatural powers in hopes of developing their talents as weapons. Soon Peter pairs up with Gillian (Amy Irving), a teen who has telekinesis, to find and rescue Robin.

programme.title: The Night House
programme.desc: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone at the lakeside home he built for her. She tries her best to keep it together -- but then the nightmares come. Disturbing visions of a presence in the house call to her, beckoning Beth with a ghostly allure. She soon begins searching for answers, only to find secrets both strange and disturbing.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: All seems well for Eric Bowen (Sam Rockwell), wife Amy (Rosemarie DeWitt) and their three children as they move into their new house in the suburbs of Illinois. Soon, the youngest daughter Maddy (Kennedi Clements) begins talking to an imaginary friend, or so the family thinks. It's not long before sinister spirits wreak havoc in the home, holding Maddy captive and forcing the parents to consult a team of parapsychologists who engage the supernatural entities in a battle for the girl's freedom.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: All seems well for Eric Bowen (Sam Rockwell), wife Amy (Rosemarie DeWitt) and their three children as they move into their new house in the suburbs of Illinois. Soon, the youngest daughter Maddy (Kennedi Clements) begins talking to an imaginary friend, or so the family thinks. It's not long before sinister spirits wreak havoc in the home, holding Maddy captive and forcing the parents to consult a team of parapsychologists who engage the supernatural entities in a battle for the girl's freedom.

programme.title: The Night House
programme.desc: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone at the lakeside home he built for her. She tries her best to keep it together -- but then the nightmares come. Disturbing visions of a presence in the house call to her, beckoning Beth with a ghostly allure. She soon begins searching for answers, only to find secrets both strange and disturbing.

programme.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
programme.desc: Forty years ago, on the night they were meant to elope, Charlotte Hollis (Bette Davis) found her lover decapitated during a party, the blood on her dress leading everyone to suspect she was the murderer. Now, in 1964, Charlotte is an old recluse and must fight to keep her home. She enlists the help of her cousin Velma (Olivia de Havilland), who was there at the time of the murder. However, soon after Velma's arrival, Charlotte's mind becomes unstable, and she starts seeing her dead lover's head.

programme.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
programme.desc: Schatze Page, Loco Dempsey and Pola Debevoise (Lauren Bacall, Betty Grable, Marilyn Monroe) are three women on a mission: They all want to marry a millionaire. To accomplish this task, they move into a fancy New York City apartment and begin courting the city's elite. They have no problem meeting rich men, but unfortunately most of them turn out to be creeps or cons. Eventually they must decide: Is a life of luxury more important to them than finding true love?

programme.title: Will Success Spoil Rock Hunter?
programme.desc: Rock Hunter (Tony Randall) writes television commercials, and he's hatched a strategy for a new beauty product. Needing a famous face to deliver his message, Rock tries to recruit actress Rita Marlowe (Jayne Mansfield). At first, she thinks it's beneath her, but she wants to make her actor lover (Mickey Hargitay) envious, so she agrees, as long as Rock pretends to be her boyfriend. Soon, Rock is running the ad company, but his ascension is greeted by all kinds of personal troubles.

programme.title: Let's Make Love
programme.desc: One of the wealthiest men in the world, Jean-Marc Clement (Yves Montand) is rich in money, but lacking in love. While seeking someone who adores him for his personality rather than his fortune, Clement learns that he is the subject of a satirical theater production. Unrecognized as he visits the play's set, Clement is offered the part as himself by the show's unwitting producers, and he takes the gig to be close to the gorgeous yet down-to-earth actress Amanda Dell (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: 9 to 5
programme.desc: Office satire about three female secretaries who decide to get revenge on their tyrannical, sexist boss by abducting him and running the business themselves. The trio, one of whom has been passed over for promotion because she is a woman, spend a night together having drug-induced fantasies of killing the slave-driving chauvinist. One of them panics the following day when she suspects she really has poisoned the tyrant.

programme.title: Working Girl
programme.desc: Savvy New York City receptionist Tess McGill (Melanie Griffith) gives her conniving boss, Katharine Parker (Sigourney Weaver), an excellent business tip, but Katharine simply steals the idea without giving due credit to her secretary. After Katharine winds up in the hospital with an injured leg, Tess decides to exact revenge. Pretending to be her boss, Tess initiates a major deal with an investment broker (Harrison Ford) -- but things turn ugly after Katharine finds out what Tess has been up to.

programme.title: Barb & Star Go to Vista Del Mar
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Barb and Star embark on the adventure of a lifetime when they decide to leave their small Midwestern town for the first time ever.

programme.title: My Cousin Vinny
programme.desc: New York lawyer Vinny has never won a case. When his teenage cousin Bill and his friend Stan are accused of murder in a backwater Alabama town, it's up to the nervous Vinny to save him from jail, even though he's only ever tried personal injury cases before, and none of them successfully.

programme.title: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Since the time they were little girls, best friends Liv (Kate Hudson) and Emma (Anne Hathaway) have been planning every aspect of their future weddings, including choosing the same destination: New York's famed Plaza Hotel. But when a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, Liv and Kate discover their inner demons -- with their lifelong friendship as a possible casualty.

programme.title: Never Been Kissed
programme.desc: Josie Geller, a baby-faced junior copywriter at the Chicago Sun-Times, must pose as a student at her former high school to research contemporary teenage culture. With the help of her brother, Rob, Josie infiltrates the inner circle of the most popular clique on campus. But she hits a major snag in her investigation -- not to mention her own failed love life -- when she falls for her dreamy English teacher, Sam Coulson.

programme.title: Just Married
programme.desc: Tom (Ashton Kutcher) and Sarah (Brittany Murphy) are two lovebirds from different worlds. He's an average guy with a fondness for beer who works a low-level job, while she's an aspiring writer from a wealthy and cultured family. The disapproval of family and friends doesn't prevent the pair from marrying, but their disastrous honeymoon in Italy, with an unwelcome appearance by Sarah's ex-boyfriend, Peter (Christian Kane), nearly succeeds in tearing them apart.

programme.title: Barb & Star Go to Vista Del Mar
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Barb and Star embark on the adventure of a lifetime when they decide to leave their small Midwestern town for the first time ever.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A celebration of love and creative inspiration takes place in the infamous, gaudy and glamorous Parisian nightclub, at the cusp of the 20th century. A young poet (Ewan McGregor), who is plunged into the heady world of Moulin Rouge, begins a passionate affair with the club's most notorious and beautiful star (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt, a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meets Oktober, the mysterious leader of the group.

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov, the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police. Their plans are interrupted, however, when their Moscow hideout is raided by a cunning politician.

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist organization is holding an English ambassador hostage, which further complicates matters.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: New York City custodian Daryl Deever (William Hurt) is a big fan of local news reporter Tony Sokolow (Sigourney Weaver), so he is intrigued when she shows up to cover a story at his workplace. There's been a murder in the office building, and Tony suspects that Daryl may have insight into the crime, a notion that he furthers to stay close to her. However, when those behind the killing begin to think that Daryl really knows something, they target both him and Tony to keep their secrets hidden.

programme.title: Gleaming the Cube
programme.desc: A California skateboarder (Christian Slater) solves and avenges the death of his adopted Vietnamese brother.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Ford v Ferrari
programme.desc: American automotive designer Carroll Shelby and fearless British race car driver Ken Miles battle corporate interference, the laws of physics and their own personal demons to build a revolutionary vehicle for the Ford Motor Co. Together, they plan to compete against the race cars of Enzo Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in France in 1966.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product, a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Are We There Yet? (2005)
programme.desc: Ice Cube plays Nick, a playboy bachelor and sports memorabilia collector who dates a divorced mother of two young kids who never like the men their mom dates. Things go awry when Nick offers to drive the kids from Portland to Vancouver where their mother is stuck for work.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: A family leaves the big city for a fixer-upper in the 'burbs, but their investment quickly turns from a dream into a nightmare.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.desc: The Stooges get jobs as census takers and wind up in a fancy mansion looking for people to survey. Moe and Larry are recruited to join a bridge game, while Curly adds Alum to the lemonade. The resulting concoction is consumed by everyone, resulting in puckered lips and shrunken clothes. The boys next try to take the census at a football stadium. They disguise themselves as players and wind up in the middle of the game. Curly runs off with the ball and all the other players in pursuit.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: A terrific ensemble cast takes reading the classics to new heights of passion in this charming romantic comedy.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: A terrific ensemble cast takes reading the classics to new heights of passion in this charming romantic comedy.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: Maid In Manhattan
programme.desc: A woman (Lopez) takes a job as a chambermaid at a luxury hotel in New York. She meets and falls in love with a debonair heir to an America political dynasty (Fiennes), who mistakes her for a society woman. When her real identity is revealed, the truth sets in about the disparity of their lives.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: The Toy (1982)
programme.desc: Remake of the Pierre Richard comedy LE JOUET with Pryor as a penniless writer hired by zillionaire Gleason as plaything for spoiled son Schwartz. Gleason tells his son he can have any present he wants and the son picks the most outrageous gift of all--Richard Pryor.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: A terrific ensemble cast takes reading the classics to new heights of passion in this charming romantic comedy.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is the hit of Mother/Daughter Career Day at Kelly's school when she instructs the girls in the art of being a housewife, including demonstrations of wallet pilfering and mastering the TV remote control.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Kelly is faced with a choice of getting kicked out of school or joining the tap dance club, she swallows her pride, buckles on her tap shoes and performs some dirty dancing that leaves the audience sweating in their seats.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: A Three Job, No Income Family
programme.desc: When Peggy gets a job selling cosmetics and brings home more money than Al, he gets a second job to regain his self-respect, but still finds himself losing the breadwinning game.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: After Peggy gives the highway salute to a rude driver while in the Rhoades' car, Steve is obsessed with the fear that the enraged driver -- a possible ex-con -- may come looking for him.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy return from vacation after entrusting the keys to their house to Peggy, they're shocked to find a big hole where their house used to be.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In this two-part story, Peggy and Al attend the Polk High School Reunion where Peggy is determined to defeat her old nemesis for the title of Reunion Queen.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy vigorously campaigns for the title of Reunion Queen while Al settles an old score with a former classmate at the Polk High School Reunion.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy brings the family closer to the poorhouse when she insists on buying a home computer.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is so miserable when her favorite bra is discontinued, that Al is forced to take matters into his own hands and find a replacement.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Steve face up to the bald fact that they are both losing their hair, they decide to seek the counsel and encouragement of a hairless support group.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Bud finds it difficult to line up a date, he resorts to the next best thing - a mannequin -with a penchant for losing her head.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al decides the Bundy clan needs to spend quality time together, they pack up the suntan oil, bug spray and portable TV and head for the beach.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When a neighborhood peeping tom has taken a peek at everyone on the block except Peggy, she tries to rectify the situation by leaving milk, cookies and a ladder.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In honor of Labor Day, Al Bundy "treats" Peggy, Kelly, Bud, Steve and Marcy to an old-fashioned barbecue - Bundy style.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peggy wins a personalized workout with TV fitness host Jim Jupiter, "the healthiest man in Chicago," he sets out to change her unhealthful lifestyle, but she changes his instead.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Steve take Bud and his friends on a camping trip, Kelly sees a friendly poker game with the girls as a chance to earn money for a rock concert.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Stricken with a toothache, Al reluctantly visits a dentist for the first time, leaving him in too much pain to enjoy the family meal that Peggy has begrudgingly agreed to prepare.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: He Ain't Much But He's Mine
programme.desc: When a flashy blond at the beauty parlor brags about her affair with a married man, Peggy worries that Al is picking up more than a spare on his bowling night.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys are elated over the extra income they receive when they house a foreign exchange student, but Kelly gets a run for her money when the student turns out to be a beautiful, sexy French girl.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al panics when Peggy sells his beloved collection of Playboy magazines to buy a good luck idol to help her win the lottery. Al tries to cash in on his knowledge of shoe business by starting a shoe hotline.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al tries to cash in on his knowledge of shoe business by starting a shoe hotline.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al's car bites the dust, he digs up his nest egg and heads for the auto showroom to wheel and deal for the car of his dreams.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: After couch potato in-training Steve is fired, he plays hooky from his job hunt to go to the zoo, determined to save a sea turtle named Bosco.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: A rainstorm brings out the handyman in Al, who doggedly attempts to fix a leaky roof.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Despite his rare good intentions, Al fails to make it to the bank in time to withdraw his Christmas Club money, and the Bundy family is destined to go presentless, again, unless Al can find a way to make some quick cash. (Part I of II)

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al blows his only chance to give the family a merry Christmas, he miserably wishes that he didn't exist until a not-so-angelic angel shows what life without Al - but with Peggy's loving husband Norman - would be like. (Part II)

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Sick and tired of being the sole breadwinner, Al challenges the family to find jobs, but is in for a surprise when Kelly's talents land her the lead as "The Girl" in the Guttercats' music video.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: About to be audited by the IRS, Al has to come up with a quick five grand and decides to sell Peggy's hair.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: You Gotta Know When To Hold 'em, Part I
programme.desc: When Steve dumps Marcy to become a park ranger, ever-supportive Peggy talks her into a Las Vegas vacation with Al. (Part I of II)

programme.sub-title: You Gotta Know When To Hold 'em, Part II
programme.desc: Al goes in the ring with a lady wrestler.

programme.desc: Bud wants revenge on the girl he dates.

programme.desc: Kelly becomes a cable TV weather girl.

programme.desc: Peggy steals Al's chance at bowling glory.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is shocked to discover that she never graduated from high school and, needing one additional course to get her diploma, joins Kelly's home economics class.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: While an ecstatic Al prepares to judge a beauty contest, Marcy awakens on the Bundy couch next to a lipstick-smeared Bud and fears the worst.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al discovers Peggy's passion for yard sales has gotten out of hand, he decides that the Bundys should hold one of their own.

programme.desc: Peg meets a charming married man and his jealous "husband" shows up on the Bundy's doorstep

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: When a mysterious stranger arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death, an FBI interrogation unlocks an international plot of revenge.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: There are heroes--there are superheroes--and then there's Hancock. With great power comes great responsibility--everyone knows that--everyone, that is, but Hancock. Edgy, conflicted, sarcastic, and misunderstood, Hancock's well-intentioned heroics might get the job done and save countless lives, but always seem to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake. The public has finally had enough--as grateful as they are to have their local hero, the good citizens of Los Angeles are wondering what they ever did to deserve this guy. Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
programme.desc: Former MMA superstar agrees to train a fighter for the match of a lifetime in Thailand.

programme.title: Black and Blue (2019)
programme.desc: After capturing crooked cops killing drug dealers on her body cam, a female rookie must evade the narcotics officers who are after the incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: Lee Gates, a bombastic television stock huckster, is taken hostage on his TV show by an outraged gunman. As much of the world watches live, Gates must keep himself alive and, with help from the woman who produces the show, uncover the truth behind a tangle of big money lies.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer

programme.title: The Guardian - Pilot
programme.desc: A corporate lawyer is sentenced to perform community service representing abused, neglected and at risk kids.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick is assigned to represent a pregnant fifteen-year-old who has accused her stepfather of rape.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: The success of Nick's lawsuit against a pharmaceutical company depends on a young boy accusing his father of murder; James tries to keep an eleven-year-old from following his mom and older brother into prison.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Upon learning he has ALS, Alvin spirits Nick away for a bachelor weekend in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: When a teenaged molestation victim refuses to identify his attacker, Nick suspects his father of the assault.

programme.title: The Guardian

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Trying to put the memories of his deadly mission to Point Blanc behind him, Alex takes a holiday on the Cornish coast. But when an old foe resurfaces, Alex finds himself dragged back into the world of spycraft.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Determined to track down Alan Blunt and warn him, Alex unknowingly puts himself on a collision course with the Department who are simultaneously hunting a dangerous cyber-terrorist. But are the two cases more related than either side realise?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex refuses to walk away from his investigation into the attack on Ed Pleasance, and with Sabina and Tom's help discovers a new lead connecting it to the Pentagon hack, putting him in the crosshairs of Smoking Mirror.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex must infiltrate a prestigious event if he's to learn more about the mysterious phenomenon that is the video game Feathered Serpent and its coming sequel, confronting the charismatic billionaire behind it, Damian Cray.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To unlock the secrets of Feathered Serpent 2, Alex seeks expert assistance from an old friend. But with his own investigation spiraling out of control, how long before Blunt puts a stop to Alex's dangerous inference?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex, Tom and Kyra journey to Amsterdam, to infiltrate the heart of Damian Cray's operation, while the Department turn their scrutiny on Cray's forthcoming meeting with the President of the United States.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To escape Amsterdam and deliver vital evidence to the Department, Alex needs Jack's help - putting her career in jeopardy. But with the US President's touchdown in the UK already underway, is Alex too late to stop Cray?

programme.desc: As Feathered Serpent 2 finally launches and the full scope of Cray's plan is revealed, Alex races against the clock to avert a catastrophic attack.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: Lola Versus

With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand is a young bull who escapes from a training camp in rural Spain after his father never returns from a showdown with a matador. Adopted by a girl who lives on a farm, Ferdinand's peaceful existence comes crashing down when the authorities return him to his former captors. With help from a wisecracking goat and three hedgehogs, the giant but gentle bovine must find a way to break free before he squares off against El Primero, the famous bullfighter who never loses.

programme.title: Wild Card: The Downfall of a Radio Loudmouth
programme.desc: New York sports radio personality Craig Carton's secret gambling addiction, financed by an illicit ticket-broking business, brings his career to a halt when he is arrested by FBI agents and charged with conspiracy, wire fraud and securities fraud.

programme.title: Liberty: Mother of Exiles
programme.desc: The history of the Statue of Liberty and its meaning to the people of this world.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: The Legend of Ochi
programme.desc: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
programme.desc: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

programme.title: Murder in Glitterball City
programme.desc: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

programme.title: Murder in Glitterball City
programme.desc: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Tatiana Suarez
programme.desc: A chronicle of the MMA fighter Tatiana Suarez as she returns to the sport after an injury forced a four-year hiatus; Suarez reflects on her journey from wrestling prodigy to professional athlete in the UFC and the legacy she leaves young women.

programme.title: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
programme.desc: Actor Christopher Reeve rises to stardom when he lands the role of Superman in the 1970s. When a horse-riding accident leaves him paralyzed in 1995, Reeve spends the rest of his life searching for a cure for spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: Superman: The Movie
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman III
programme.desc: Computer programmer Gus Gorman (Richard Pryor) is hired by financial tycoon Ross Webster (Robert Vaughn) to seize control of a weather satellite and annihilate Colombia's coffee crop. When Superman (Christopher Reeve) manages to thwart the plan, Webster commands Gorman to use the satellite to locate kryptonite, the Man of Steel's mortal weakness. But a missing unknown element in the kryptonite -- replaced by Gorman with tar -- causes an unintended side effect when presented to Superman.

programme.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
programme.desc: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive material to create Nuclear Man (Mark Pillow), a being just as powerful as the man of steel.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Janet's love for her nine grandchildren is endless, but so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come to visit - to take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid zone in the backyard that is also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: George, Justin and Lewis compete for the affections of Londoner Jen. Which of the three single shoppers' fashion choices will win them a date?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. It's back to school for Nelly and Arthur, giving Greg time to concentrate on his and Chatty's medical issues as Billie has her own health concerns and heads for a post-baby mummy MOT - meanwhile, Nelly kicks off her empire by holding her first-ever business meeting, but she is not keen when mum Billie tries to get involved. Elsewhere, Greg surprises Chatty with a new health kick involving goats, and Billie and Greg get invited to the television event of the year but tensions are high as dramas unfold and the couple run late for the red carpet.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims haven't spoken in months. It's a shame, because the former besties always had so much in common, including how stubborn they both are. Chloe B has found herself at the heart of Essex drama. She may have held her hands up to sleeping with Ella's ex, but she remains unapologetic about her actions.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Whitney and Lisa avoid each other on their first international trip together until Heather's comments send dinner into chaos, and Meredith goes from a little under the weather to severely ill after not getting a room with a bathtub but recovers in time to hold the ladies accountable on the Sprinter ride to dinner - excited to kick off her birthday celebration in Bermuda, Monica comforts Meredith and a new layer of their friendship is revealed when dirt on Angie surfaces.

programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Ex-city slickers and newlyweds Lauren and Mark miss their friends and family from the city - Brian and Sarah therefore create an enticing country retreat with an outdoor party pad, indoor dining, lounge areas and a chicken coop so their friends will never want to leave when they visit.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts another episode of the exciting and iconic gameshow as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. Christmas has come early for the Shepherds as they do their first photo shoot as a family of five, but things grind to a halt as Arthur goes AWOL - Billie and family support sister Sam at her charity gala, Grandad Chatty marks his undying love for Greg, Billie's childhood dream finally comes true as she launches her new in-store range and Arthur delights everyone with a treat for baby Margot. Elsewhere, Billie surprises Nelly and Arthur with a VIP film night, and the Shepherds take a trip down memory lane after Sue finds some old family footage.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Liv has more than made her mark on Essex; it's a home from home for her. But right now, she's torn. She's splitting her time between fiance Brad in Manchester, and her besties down South.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Meredith tries to clear her name on the women's third day in Bermuda - but finds herself in an uphill battle with the ladies - as Monica worries that Meredith's attempt to smooth things over with Lisa will put a wrench in the progress she's made on her own friendship with Lisa. When Whitney then calls out Heather for being hypocritical, it leads to a showdown between the two.

programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials of family life. Meg's slumber party is ruined by her family. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. When a 'wardrobe malfunction' occurs during a live broadcast, the Federal Communications Commission begins to censor Peter's favourite television shows. As a result, Peter creates his own TV station which broadcasts from the Griffin home. Peter and Brian create their own edgy programming for the station, until the FCC shows up to shut down PTV and censor all controversial material in Quahog.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Because of a past incident at his own prom, where he was lured into a dance with the homecoming queen only to have a pile of pigs dropped on him, Stan wants revenge by showing off that he married a homecoming queen, Francine. A proud Stan accompanies Francine to her reunion, but when they find out that two ballots were lost and that Francine didn't actually win the crown, Stan is devastated.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When the CIA organises a father-son baseball game, Stan is determined to show his co-workers that his son is masculine and athletic. Unfortunately, Steve is a geek, so Stan decides to lie and ditches him.

Meanwhile, Gene and Louise stockpile huge amounts of combustible wish paper.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Grady Felton returns home to Midsomer after serving time for the murder of local youngster Daniel Denning, and Daniel's extended family are angry at his reappearance. Around the time that Grady arrives, his defence barrister Giles Harrison is killed. Grady had threatened Harrison and others - including Jones - but his alibi is strong. Later, Grady's house is firebombed, leaving him in a coma. Daniel's former friend Fred Burns is on trial for drugs offences. When Barnaby looks into Fred's background, he finds that a large sum of money appeared in Fred's bank account after the attack on Grady. After the court appearance, Jones learns that another lawyer on Grady's hit-list has been killed - but since Grady is in intensive care, he could not have been the culprit. As the detectives look further into the case, they discover that Grady always claimed innocence. Could a 'friend' be acting out Grady's revenge plan?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on characters created by crime writer Ann Cleeves. Vera's reunion with Stuart Macken, her first-ever sergeant, occurs under tragic circumstances when his house is petrol bombed - Stuart is badly burned by the attack and his 18-year-old daughter Stella is left fighting for her life in intensive care. Vera is shocked to see that Stuart is a shadow of the man that she knew 20 years before, and she is faced with some long-buried memories of her own when her investigation uncovers unpleasant revelations about his personal life.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When gynaecologist Dr Alec Merrick is accused of sexually assaulting one of his patients during a routine examination, DS Ronnie Brooks, DS Matt Devlin and DI Natalie Chandler are brought in to investigate. But how can they find enough evidence when it's just one person's word against another, and one party is an eminent doctor? Matt and Ronnie bring the case to Crown Prosecutor James Steel and they find themselves grappling with the grey areas of sexual assault charges. But when they begin to feel, along with George Castle, Director of the CPS in London, that they can get no further with this case, Crown Prosecutor Alesha Phillips refuses to accept his orders. As our team splinter, they find themselves up against unstoppable defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone, and with a thin case and a dangerous level of emotional involvement, they must battle it out in court. But who will the jury believe?

His reappearance leaves people to presume it is so he can collect the money once stolen from the bank. Greengrass finds a new vocation as a lucky chimney sweep.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is leaving for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin - the Doc goes back to his consultation room, but he is distracted and walks out before going to find Ruth, who tells him that all his problems stem from his childhood because his parents never showed him any love and that he has the propensity to change. As Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang due to a faulty generator that comes as a shock to DJ Caroline - and Al pitches his vision for Ruth's farmhouse to become a bed and breakfast to her - Martin tries to book a flight to Spain to get Louisa back. While on hold, the Doc sorts through his mail and finds a scan of Louisa's brain - when he spots a malformation, he knows that the pressure in an aeroplane could trigger it to bleed and that Louisa has recently taken anticoagulants. If the malformation were to bleed, Louisa would be at risk of suffering a brain haemorrhage...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. The Doc is back in Portwenn but without Louisa, who is taking some time out with her mother in Spain - Martin is left wondering if she will ever come back to him, but he is scheduled to see therapist Dr Rachel Timoney in a bid to give his marriage another chance in the meantime. Meanwhile, Al is fretting about his half-decorated B and B while Steve Baker, the man supposed to be helping, is busy organising a lifeboat exercise - when the time for the exercise comes round, the mock rescue becomes all too real and Martin is out at sea as the time for his first therapy session approaches.

programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners in grime Allen Millyard and Guy Willison hit the road once again in their relentless hunt for automotive treasures - this time they visit renowned collector Francis and secure a vintage Kawasaki at the National Motorcycle Museum's autumn auction. They head to a mega auto-jumble at Kempton racecourse with over two thousand pounds' worth of stock, but will their investments land them on the winner's podium or will they finish as also-rans in the competitive world of automotive trading?

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Review
programme.desc: Review 2: A look back at the standout racing moments from the 2026 event featuring the best of the two and three-wheeled action on the Mountain Course. [S]

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard - in this episode, Britain's favourite biker rides through Ed Sheeran's beloved Sussex, celebrates the 40th anniversary of the game-changing Suzuki Katana, visits fabulous collections of British and Italian bikes, and gets the ride of his life on a 50cc ITOM motorcycle.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

However, Foster's plan backfires because Harry doesn't know how to pilot the plane...

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is hired to locate a missing girl but later suffers a bout of memory loss and recovers to find that he's become the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. With the World Championship tournament just around the corner, the race for the BattleBots VII Giant Nut approaches the final straight with a fight card featuring some of the biggest names in the sport jockeying for tournament seedings in their final fight of the qualifying rounds - Lock-Jaw squares off against Madcatter in a match-up between jaws and claws, and two of the fastest machines in the show's history do battle when HyperShock tries to save its season against Claw Viper in the Main Event.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas joins a football team in a bid to protect an old college friend whose life is being threatened by an unknown assassin.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When card shark Jeanie 'Texas Lightning' Lowry hires Thomas to protect her during an offshore poker game, he ends up stranded with her on a desert island instead.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken becomes involved with the fire service once again as he tracks down a fireman-turned-arsonist, and Harry hosts a Success Through Confidence course at the Plaza Suite.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Chief Inspector Haskins is framed for corruption while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins - is there a connection?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Having hit rock bottom in Australia, Ray and Arthur are now penniless and under the threat of deportation and must now try to raise the funds for a return airfare home.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank inspect a collector's weird objects and stuffed animals, and a cuddly horse is given an impressive valuation.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland, Rick Yemm and Alex Debogorski embark on an epic race over one of the longest and most treacherous roads in Canada. Meanwhile, Lisa Kelly takes on the biggest haul of her career, and a huge promotion may be on the line.

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as celebrity contestants face the greatest quiz team in the world in the form of the Sinnerman, the Beast, the Governess, the Menace, the Vixen and the Dark Destroyer. Omid Djalili, Richard Whitehead, Jenny Eclair and Clive Mantle try to win big money for their chosen charities in this edition of the show... but can anyone beat the Chasers?

programme.title: Berlin Station
programme.desc: Kirsch and Torres follow a lead to Vienna, where they must risk their lives to secure their fallen comrade's location. When B.B. Yates returns to Berlin, the Station must decide whether or not they can trust an emissary of the Oval Office.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. The pressure is on as the final three contestants face one more challenge before the final dinner service as they bid to impress guest chefs Brian Malarkey, Curtis Stone, Giada De Laurentiis, Michael Cimarusti and Nyesha Arrington.

programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case involving action and intrigue. The Saint is persuaded by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland where he becomes an aide to a queen.
