Also looking for Moss is Sheriff Bell (Tommy Lee Jones), an aging lawman who reflects on a changing world and a dark secret of his own, as he tries to find and protect Moss.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner. When Olsen returns from the war, he and Vivienne must confront and make peace with the person each has become.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: A stranger (Philip Baker Hall) mentors a young Reno gambler (John C. Reilly) who weds a hooker (Gwyneth Paltrow) and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Following a 10-year prison stint, Driver (Dwayne Johnson) sprints through the gates to take vengeance on those responsible for his brother's murder. Within hours of dispatching his first one, he has two men on his tail: a veteran police officer (Billy Bob Thornton) and an eager assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen). Driver tries to stay a step ahead of his pursuers, but there are hints that his list is incomplete, and the unknown person may endanger his life.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: The Last Duel
programme.desc: Jean de Carrouges is a respected knight known for his bravery and skill on the battlefield. Jacques Le Gris is a squire whose intelligence and eloquence makes him one of the most admired nobles in court. When Le Gris viciously assaults Carrouges' wife, she steps forward to accuse her attacker, an act of bravery and defiance that puts her life in jeopardy. The ensuing trial by combat, a grueling duel to the death, places the fate of all three in God's hands.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor
programme.desc: Col. Cal Rhodes (Gene Hackman), a retired Marine officer, holds out hope that his son, believed to be a prisoner of war in Laos, is still alive. Despite the government's refusal to help Rhodes, he assembles a group to find and rescue his son, including skilled soldiers such as Wilkes (Fred Ward) and Sailor (Randall "Tex" Cobb). Funded by MacGregor (Robert Stack), a wealthy executive also looking for his son, Rhodes leads his men on a dangerous mission into the jungles of Laos.

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers, Sgt. John McLoughlin (Nicolas Cage) and Officer Will Jimeno (Michael Peña), become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: New York City writer Iris finds her comfortable, solitary life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. The huge dog immediately creates practical problems for Iris, from furniture destruction to eviction notices, as well as more existential ones. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past, and her own creative inner life.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Face/Off
programme.desc: Obsessed with bringing terrorist Castor Troy (Nicolas Cage) to justice, FBI agent Sean Archer (John Travolta) tracks down Troy, who has boarded a plane in Los Angeles. After the plane crashes and Troy is severely injured, possibly dead, Archer undergoes surgery to remove his face and replace it with Troy's. As Archer tries to use his disguise to elicit information about a bomb from Troy's brother, Troy awakes from a coma and forces the doctor who performed the surgery to give him Archer's face.

programme.title: Run & Gun
programme.desc: After leaving a life of crime and violence, reformed good guy Ray enjoys a quiet family life in the suburbs. However, Ray's past comes back to haunt him as he gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Although they made their way through high school successfully, an investigation at a local college brings big changes for undercover officers Jenko and Schmidt. When Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art-major scene, both men begin to question their partnership. Not only do they have to crack the case, but now the two overgrown adolescents must learn how to behave like adults.

programme.title: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. Vail finds himself up against his ex-pupil and ex-lover, but as the case progresses and the Church's dark secrets are revealed, Vail finds that what appeared a simple case takes on a darker, more dangerous aspect.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: Frank Murphy is a courageous and honorable Los Angeles police officer who is chosen to test run Blue Thunder, a high-tech experimental attack helicopter. While flying Blue Thunder, Murphy and his partner discover that the government intends to use the helicopter for corrupt crowd control and surveillance.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: Unemployed Travis (Adrien Brody) enrolls in a psychological role-playing experiment, where participants assume the identities of inmates and prison guards in an empty jail, with the promise of a $1,000-a-day reward. Another participant, Barris (Forest Whitaker), embraces his correctional officer role with a vengeance, and before long, the prisoners find themselves at the mercy of their keepers. All the test subjects discover how easily violence and cruelty can manifest itself in human behavior.

programme.title: Redbelt
programme.desc: Martial artist Mike Terry (Chiwetel Ejiofor) lives by a strict code of no competitions, for he feels that such contests weaken fighters. After saving a famous action star (Tim Allen) from a brutal attack, Mike takes a job in the film industry. He soon finds his personal beliefs and integrity on the line as circumstances force him to participate in a prize fight.

programme.title: Sniper: Reloaded
programme.desc: A sharpshooter (Chad Michael Collins) must kill another sniper before he becomes a target.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: Archenemies Luc Devereaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme) and Andrew Scott (Dolph Lundgren) contend with a terrifying army of reanimated super soldiers.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Framed for murder, a former assassin (Wesley Snipes) goes on the run to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Revenge
programme.desc: Jay Cochran (Kevin Costner), a newly retired U.S. Navy pilot, travels to Mexico to spend time with his friend Tibey Mendez (Anthony Quinn), a powerful but corrupt businessman. While there, he meets Tibey's beautiful wife, Miryea (Madeleine Stowe), who has become unhappy in her marriage. Jay and Miryea soon engage in a steamy affair. But when Tibey learns of the relationship from his henchman, Cesar (Tomas Milian), he sets out to get even with both of them.

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: A family man (Jan-Michael Vincent) and a mob witness (Leo Rossi) hunt a mob hit man (Lance Henriksen) who has mistakenly kidnapped the family man's son.

programme.title: Return to Warbow
programme.desc: Three escaped convicts return to collect the money that the brother of one of them has already spent.

programme.title: Apache Territory
programme.desc: A drifter crossing the Arizona desert routs a band of marauding Apaches and rescues the young survivor of a massacre.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: Private detective James Barlow (Randolph Scott) is sent to Indiana to infiltrate the ranks of the four Reno Brothers (Denver Pyle, Forrest Tucker, J. Carrol Naish, Myron Healy), a gang running roughshod over luckless locals. After attracting the Renos' attention with a staged train robbery, Barlow gets in deeper when he strikes up a romance with their sister, Laura (Mala Powers). Gradually, Barlow devises a strategy to set the brothers up for ambush in another train robbery.

programme.title: The Black Dakotas
programme.desc: A Confederate plot to turn the Sioux against the Union crumbles when a double agent makes off with a shipment of gold.

programme.title: The Scarlet and the Black
programme.desc: Defying a Nazi colonel (Christopher Plummer), Vatican Monsignor Hugh O'Flaherty (Gregory Peck) hides thousands of escaped POWs in occupied Rome.

programme.title: Mackenna's Gold
programme.desc: Apaches, townsfolk, a Mexican bandit (Omar Sharif) and the cavalry follow a sheriff (Gregory Peck) to a mythical canyon of gold.

programme.title: Thunderheart
programme.desc: When a series of murders stuns a small Native American reservation, the FBI sends in agent Ray Levoi to investigate. While Ray is relatively inexperienced, he is one quarter Sioux and the FBI hopes that will make it easier for them to gather information from the locals. While the reservation police officer views the agent as an outsider, the tribal elder believes him to be the reincarnated spirit of Thunderheart, a Native American hero.

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: The Maclean brothers, Paul and Norman, live a relatively idyllic life in rural Montana, spending much of their time fly-fishing. The sons of a minister, the boys eventually part company when Norman moves east to attend college, leaving his rebellious brother to find trouble back home. When Norman finally returns, the siblings resume their fishing outings, and assess both where they've been and where they're going.

programme.title: The Scarlet and the Black
programme.desc: Defying a Nazi colonel (Christopher Plummer), Vatican Monsignor Hugh O'Flaherty (Gregory Peck) hides thousands of escaped POWs in occupied Rome.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: Striking Distance
programme.desc: Sgt. Tom Hardy (Bruce Willis) denounces his partner, Jimmy Detillo (Robert Pastorelli), for brutally interrogating a suspect. After Jimmy falls to his death from a bridge, Tom is transferred from homicide to the river rescue team. Two years later, the bodies of murdered young women begin turning up in the water -- all of whom were previously romantically linked to Tom. With the help of his new partner, Jo Christman (Sarah Jessica Parker), Tom sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: Hardwired
programme.desc: After surviving a car crash that kills his pregnant wife, Luke Gibson (Cuba Gooding Jr.) wakes up in the hospital with complete amnesia. He's been severely injured, but is alive thanks to a groundbreaking brain implant from a powerful multinational corporation. As Luke recovers, he starts to realize his implant is dangerous and seeks help from Hal (Michael Ironside), the leader of a group of hackers. A shadowy executive (Val Kilmer) tries to stop Luke and Hal before they learn too much.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: Frank Murphy is a courageous and honorable Los Angeles police officer who is chosen to test run Blue Thunder, a high-tech experimental attack helicopter. While flying Blue Thunder, Murphy and his partner discover that the government intends to use the helicopter for corrupt crowd control and surveillance.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: Unemployed Travis (Adrien Brody) enrolls in a psychological role-playing experiment, where participants assume the identities of inmates and prison guards in an empty jail, with the promise of a $1,000-a-day reward. Another participant, Barris (Forest Whitaker), embraces his correctional officer role with a vengeance, and before long, the prisoners find themselves at the mercy of their keepers. All the test subjects discover how easily violence and cruelty can manifest itself in human behavior.

programme.title: Redbelt
programme.desc: Martial artist Mike Terry (Chiwetel Ejiofor) lives by a strict code of no competitions, for he feels that such contests weaken fighters. After saving a famous action star (Tim Allen) from a brutal attack, Mike takes a job in the film industry. He soon finds his personal beliefs and integrity on the line as circumstances force him to participate in a prize fight.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A crew of officers at an armored transport security firm risk their lives when they embark on a heist against their own company. Armed with a seemingly fool-proof plan, the men plan on making off with a fortune with harm to none. But when an unexpected witness interferes, the plan quickly unravels and all bets are off.

programme.title: The Tall T
programme.desc: The luck of Pat Brennan (Randolph Scott) is about to go from bad to worse; after gambling his horse away, he gets a ride from Willard (John Hubbard) and Doretta Mims (Maureen O'Sullivan). Soon, their stagecoach is hijacked by a trio of merciless bandits, led by the especially heartless Frank Usher (Richard Boone). As Usher holds the coach passengers hostage, Brennan falls in love with Doretta and develops a risky plan to free himself and the Mimses, leading to a bloody final standoff.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: Following the expansion of the United States into the Southwest, the Apache Indians are forced onto a reservation to live out their lives as lowly corn farmers. While many resign themselves to this fate, several Apaches, including Geronimo (Wes Studi), refuse to go quietly. Hoping to quell a major rebellion, General Charles Crook (Gene Hackman) dispatches over 5,000 U.S. Cavalry soldiers, led by Lieutenant Charles Gatewood (Jason Patric), to hunt down Geronimo and his men.

programme.title: Breakout
programme.desc: A woman (Jill Ireland) hires a bush pilot (Charles Bronson) to free her husband (Robert Duvall), framed for a murder, from a Mexican prison.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: During World War II, Nazi officer Max Radl devises a plan to kidnap or kill the British prime minister. Approved by German Cmdr. Heinrich Himmler, the scheme moves forward with Col. Kurt Steiner leading the mission, aided by Liam Devlin, an Irishman with a deep hatred of England. As the plan unfolds, it seems to be going well -- until certain events threaten the group's shot at success.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Undersea adventure about a couple who become involved in a dangerous conflict with treasure hunters when they discover a deadly shipwreck in Bermudan waters. When they realize that the cache includes morphine, the pair enlist the help of an old treasure hunter to escape the drug dealers who hid their product amidst the sunken wreck.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Serial swindler Bernie Laplante (Dustin Hoffman) makes the first selfless gesture of his life when he helps save injured passengers from a roadside plane crash and then vanishes into the night. Hoping to find the hero who pulled her out of the wreck, reporter Gale Gayley (Geena Davis) announces a $1 million prize for stepping forward. But when handsome vagrant John Bubber (Andy Garcia) takes credit, Bernie struggles to expose him amid a media circus and countless adoring fans.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: Nick Gardenia (Chevy Chase) is a writer who has moved to a cabin in the California mountains to work on a novel. He is kidnapped by a pair of criminals and forced into robbing a bank. On the run from the law, Nick seeks assistance from his ex-wife, Glenda (Goldie Hawn), a big-hearted lawyer. Knowing he would never commit a crime, she lets him stay at her house despite the fact that her husband, Ira (Charles Grodin), a district attorney, is throwing a party for law enforcement officials.

programme.title: To Die For
programme.desc: Suzanne Stone is a weather reporter at her small-town cable station, but she dreams of being a big-time news anchor. However, she feels that her middle-class husband is holding her back, so she decides to have him murdered. For this, she enlists Jimmy, a high school boy who is enamored with her. The plan doesn't work exactly as she intended, though, and her husband's family starts to suspect that she was involved in his death.

programme.title: Spring Break
programme.desc: College guys (David Knell, Steve Bassett, Perry Lang) team up for beer, silly contests and friendship with girls in Fort Lauderdale, Fla.

programme.title: Elektra Luxx
programme.desc: A favor for a woman from her past throws the life of a pregnant, retired porn star (Carla Gugino) into chaos.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Carl Anderson (Liam Neeson), a deaf, mute and homeless war veteran, is arrested for the murder of a prominent judge's secretary. But Kathleen Riley (Cher), Anderson's lawyer, believes her client is innocent. She sets out to track down the real killer, and, as the trial proceeds, makes an unlikely ally in Eddie Sanger (Dennis Quaid), a jury member. When they aren't in court, the two investigate the case and manage to uncover a massive conspiracy.

programme.title: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Having been cut from his professional football team, down-and-out athlete Terry Brogan (Jeff Bridges) is in desperate need of money. Crooked nightclub owner and bookie Jake Wise (James Woods) offers Terry a hefty sum to go to Mexico and find his girlfriend, Jessie Wyler (Rachel Ward). Terry cannot turn the offer down. When Terry locates Jessie, the two fall in love. Terry reports that he failed to find her; but Jake sends someone else. Terry and Jessie's love must endure unexpected twists.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: After serving three years in prison covering for her gangster boyfriend, Kevin (Jeremy Northam), Gloria (Sharon Stone) returns to New York City for the money she was promised. Inside Kevin's base of operations, she finds 7-year-old Nicky (Jean-Luke Figueroa), whose family has been killed. Nicky is hanging onto a computer disk that incriminates the gang. Kevin refuses to pay Gloria, so she steals Nicky and the evidence. On the run in the city, the cynical ex-convict and the young boy grow close.

programme.title: Raampur Ka Lakshman
programme.desc: On a journey, Kedarnath, his wife and sons are separated. Lakshman stays with his father, Laxmi works as a maidservant and Ram is abducted by a criminal.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Heiress Seeta is enslaved by her abusive aunt, whereas her long-lost twin Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer.

programme.title: Raaj Tilak
programme.desc: The king is cheated by his own men. Several years later, when atrocities are inflicted on the people, the real prince returns to avenge his family.

programme.title: Sharafat
programme.desc: Jagatram hopes that Rajesh will marry his daughter. But one day he learns about Rajesh's promiscuous ways which makes him change his mind.

programme.title: Yaarana
programme.desc: Two childhood friends face betrayal and sacrifice as loyalty is tested by fate, revealing the power and pain of brotherhood bound by love and trust.

programme.title: Dard
programme.desc: A man takes the blame for a crime he didn't commit to protect his sister's happiness. After years in jail, he returns hoping to reunite with his love, only to learn she is gone.

programme.title: Men In Black
programme.desc: James, an NYC cop, is hired by Agent K of a secret government agency that monitors extraterrestrial life on Earth. Together, they must recover an item that has been stolen by an intergalactic villain.

programme.title: PK

programme.title: Taare Zameen Par
programme.desc: A compassionate teacher helps a misunderstood child overcome learning difficulties through encouragement, creativity and emotional support, transforming his confidence and future positively.

programme.title: Hit: The Second Case
programme.desc: Laid back cop Krishna Dev investigates a gruesome murder case. As KD unravels the layers of the crime, the stakes rise unbelievably high and a threat comes unusually close.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba ventures into a haunted Kolkata estate, confronting two vengeful spirits, each claiming to be the notorious Manjulika.

programme.desc: Rocky takes control of the Kolar Gold Fields and his newfound power makes the government as well as his enemies jittery. However, he still has to confront Ramika, Adheera and Inayat

programme.title: Check
programme.desc: A conman's excellent game of chess turns into his only hope, after being wrongly convicted as a death row prisoner on terrorism charges. Follow his race against time to come clean and reclaim freedom.

programme.title: Kya Bolti Tu?
programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches

programme.desc: During a mountain holiday, the team is caught between robbers and the pursuing Army; guests Ken Swofford, Kristen Meadows.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Evil Garthe Knight (David Hasselhoff) plans to steal missiles using a truck made like KITT.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Goliath damages KITT, leaving injured Michael to rebuild the car from a blueprint; guests Barbara Rush, Zakes Mokae.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: KITT frees a prisoner who alone can stop an explosion set to destroy a city; guest Catherine Mary Stewart.

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A mysterious virus strikes Brackett, Gage and a firefighter; the paramedics aid a teenage vertigo victim; guest Cathy Lee Crosby.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The Rampart staff struggles to save a girl injured by a drunken driver; Gage's Indian heritage becomes the topic of a feud with Chet.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics rescue the driver and passengers of a school bus that plunged over a cliff; Gage dreams of becoming a rich rodeo star.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage falls for an overzealous, undercover police officer (Sharon Gless); a series of thefts of equipment plagues Rampart Emergency.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A former Vietnam medic volunteers to train as a paramedic, but his quick diagnoses and independent medical efforts yield disaster.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An outspoken, feminist journalist covering the paramedics manages to alienate both the fire department and Rampart Emergency staff.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto maneuvers Gage into a blind date with his wife's cousin; Brackett must operate on a newlywed husband felled by gunshot wounds.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A stripper helps Crockett and Tubbs search for a young mother who can incriminate a mobster; guest Frankie Valli.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A drug dealer's passion for an addict who despises him gives Crockett and Tubbs a risky edge in a deadly game; guest Miles Davis.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Voodoo comes into play when a Haitian mobster (Clarence Williams III) presumed dead returns to settle a score with a former associate.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Hide-and-seek turns deadly when Tubbs and Crockett attempt to protect a renegade CIA agent's (Dean Stockwell) Soviet wife and child.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Gina seeks Crockett's help in finding a victim willing to press assault charges against a Bolivian banker's son; guest El DeBarge.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A former Vietnam correspondent (Bob Balaban) shows up raving about an officer (G. Gordon Liddy) who returned with a fortune in heroin.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A judge hires the team to free his daughter, held prisoner in Italy by mobsters seeking to ensure the outcome of a trial.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team uses monster-movie special effects to combat a war criminal terrorizing Mexican villagers; guest Dennis Cole.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate exploits death threats, fabricated for publicity, to kill his manager.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A motivational researcher blackmails to further his career, kills a man, then frames the victim's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An enraged publisher hires a gunman to kill an author who intends to sign a contract with a competitor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prodigy and his robot help investigate the murder of a professor who threatened to disgrace a colleague's scientist son.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A gospel singer kills his evangelist wife when she denies him more money and threatens blackmail.

programme.title: The Skulls III
programme.desc: A young woman (Clare Kramer) gets more than she bargained for when she gains entrance to a males-only secret society.","large":"In this sequel, beautiful and determined college student Taylor Brooks (Clare Kramer) is intent on joining the secret society known as the Skulls, despite its history of being an organization consisting solely of men. Although she encounters strong resistance, Taylor takes steps toward being accepted into their ranks, but her efforts are derailed when her boyfriend is found dead. Taylor is considered the prime suspect. Can she clear her name and track down the real murderer?

programme.title: The Spider Woman Strikes Back
programme.desc: She (Gale Sondergaard) and her hulking servant grow bloodsucking plants, as a young woman (Brenda Joyce) finds out.

programme.title: Stephanie
programme.desc: After a mysterious global catastrophe, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home.","large":"A young girl is left alone in her house during a worldwide catastrophe and fearfully hides from a malevolent force that is stalking her. When her parents miraculously return, they try to settle back into normal life, but become increasingly concerned about something that has affected their daughter Stephanie.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: Passengers (Jamie Lee Curtis, William Baldwin, Donald Sutherland) on a sinking ship board a seemingly deserted Russian vessel containing a mutating alien force.","large":"Caught in a typhoon, a tugboat commanded by Robert Everton (Donald Sutherland) comes across a mysterious near-deserted ship. Excited to find a vessel that could be sold for as much as $30 million, Everton and his crew board and prepare to move the craft, despite the warnings of sole survivor Nadia Vinogradova (Joanna Pacula). When a malevolent alien presence begins killing off the crew, navigator Kit Foster (Jamie Lee Curtis) tries to convince the rest of them to leave before it's too late.

programme.title: Visions
programme.desc: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

programme.title: Wer
programme.desc: In France, an American female attorney (A.J. Cook) defends a murder suspect who has a brutish appearance and a deadly secret.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Wilding
programme.desc: A family tries to start over following a daughter's release from a mental health institution.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Policemen Slim (Bud Abbott) and Tubby (Lou Costello) go to London and meet a doctor (Boris Karloff) and his evil alter ego.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dracula (Bela Lugosi) wants to put porter's (Lou Costello) brain in monster's body.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man
programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Killer, Boris Karloff
programme.desc: A hotel detective (Bud Abbott) and bellhop (Lou Costello) find dead bodies and a fake swami (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
programme.desc: Two guys stuck in Egypt follow a medallion to the crypt of Kharis.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: Scientists (Arthur Hill, David Wayne, James Olson) rush to isolate an alien germ brought back by a space probe.","large":"Chilling tale about a US research satellite carrying a deadly extraterrestrial microscopic organism that crashes into a small town in Arizona. A group of top scientists are hurriedly assembled in a bid to identify and contain the lethal stowaway. Based on the novel by Michael Crichton.

programme.title: The Black Cat
programme.desc: Stranded Budapest honeymooners follow a mad doctor (Bela Lugosi) to a black-lipped architect's (Boris Karloff) Art Deco manor.

programme.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A boy (Scott Sealey) upset by his parents' divorce must also tell the sheriff his father (Kerwin Mathews) is a werewolf.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: The Car
programme.desc: A Western deputy sheriff (James Brolin) chases a driverless black car that keeps running people down.","large":"Two bicyclists are run down by a strange black car in the desert near a small town in Utah. But this is just the first in a series of hit-and-run murders. Sheriff Wade Parents (James Brolin) is called in to investigate, and his deputy, Everett (John Marley), is killed by the black sedan, which, some witnesses say, has no one behind its wheel. When the car threatens a local school parade, the lives of the town's children and Wade's teacher girlfriend, Lauren (Kathleen Lloyd), are endangered.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Fossil hunters (Richard Carlson, Julia Adams, Richard Denning) encounter a dangerous, humanlike amphibian in the Amazon.","large":"Remnants of a mysterious animal have come to light in a remote jungle, and a group of scientists intends to determine if the find is an anomaly or evidence of an undiscovered beast. To accomplish their goal, the scientists (Antonio Moreno, Richard Carlson, Richard Denning, Whit Bissell) must brave the most perilous pieces of land South America has to offer. But the terrain is nothing compared to the danger posed by an otherworldly being that endangers their work and their lives.

programme.title: The Creature Walks Among Us
programme.desc: Scientists (Jeff Morrow, Rex Reason) capture the creature from the black lagoon and turn him into an air breather.

programme.title: Curse of the Undead
programme.desc: A cow-town preacher (Eric Fleming) shoots a custom bullet at a vampire gunfighter (Michael Pate) in the Old West.

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf
programme.desc: The son of a servant assaulted by a beggar becomes a wolfman in 18th-century Spain.

programme.title: Curucu, Beast of the Amazon
programme.desc: A doctor (Beverly Garland) and an adventurer (John Bromfield) head for the Amazon, where a guy (Tom Payne) in a bird suit is scaring natives.

programme.title: The Deadly Mantis
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Craig Stevens) and a paleontologist (William Hopper) track a huge praying mantis from the North Pole to Manhattan.

programme.title: Dr. Cyclops
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Albert Dekker) in Peru reduces a woman (Janice Logan) and three men to one-fifth their normal size.","large":"To assist with his work due to his failing eyesight, renowned biologist Dr. Alexander Thorkel invites two prominent scientists and a mineralogist to his hidden Amazon jungle laboratory. Thorkel remains evasive about the nature of his experiments, and after the team evaluates his bacteria slides, he orders them away. When they refuse, Thorkel and his servant trick them into a chamber where Thorkel shrinks them down to microscopic size, and they escape to the terrifying jungle.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: A real-estate man (Dwight Frye) visits the Transylvania castle of a 500-year-old vampire (Bela Lugosi).","large":"The dashing, mysterious Count Dracula (Bela Lugosi), after hypnotizing a British soldier, Renfield (Dwight Frye), into his mindless slave, travels to London and takes up residence in an old castle. Soon Dracula begins to wreak havoc, sucking the blood of young women and turning them into vampires. When he sets his sights on Mina (Helen Chandler), the daughter of a prominent doctor, vampire-hunter Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan) is enlisted to put a stop to the count's never-ending bloodlust.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier) investigates as the vampire count (Frank Langella) scales walls and visits bedrooms at an English manor.","large":"A man washes ashore in England after a shipwreck and is found by Mina Van Helsing (Jan Francis). The man introduces himself as Count Dracula (Frank Langella) of Transylvania, and proceeds to integrate himself into the lives of Mina and her friend Lucy Seward (Kate Nelligan). However, when Mina dies and her father, Prof. Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier), attributes her death to a vampire, evidence indicates that Count Dracula is the monster, and Lucy is his next target.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: This was made at night using the same sets and script as the Bela Lugosi classic but with a Spanish cast.","large":"Soon after beginning work for Conde Dracula (Carlos Villarias), the clerk Renfield (Pablo Alvarez Rubio) learns that his employer is, in fact, a vampire who lives on human blood. Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter
programme.desc: A vampire countess (Gloria Holden) in black falls in love with a psychologist (Otto Kruger) and kidnaps his fiancée (Marguerite Churchill).","large":"Although Count Dracula was destroyed by Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan), who is now being tried for his murder, Dracula's daughter, the Countess Marya Zaleska (Gloria Holden), is still alive -- and her father's death has brought her no closer to eradicating her vampiric thirst for blood. When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.title: The Evil of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron (Peter Cushing) and a hypnotist (Peter Woodthorpe) bring the creature out of ice, horrifying villagers of Karlsbad.","large":"Dr. Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) returns destitute to his home village to recommence his experimental research into the reanimation of dead tissue, and stumbles upon his old monster suspended in ice. Though he revives the creature, Frankenstein must seek the help of hypnotist Zoltan (Peter Woodthorpe) to repair its mind. Zoltan then assumes control of the monster, using him to wreak havoc. But when Frankenstein tries to regain power over his creation, he becomes Zoltan's next target.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein creates a monster from cadavers and a killer's brain.

programme.title: Frankenstein Meets the Wolfman
programme.desc: Tormented werewolf Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) calls on Dr. Frankenstein and finds his monster (Bela Lugosi) instead.","large":"Lawrence Stewart Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) is plagued by a physical oddity that turns him into a crazed werewolf after sundown. His desire to rid himself of this ailment leads him to the castle owned by mad scientist Dr. Frankenstein. Frankenstein, it turns out, is now dead, yet Talbot believes that the scientist's daughter, Baroness Elsa Frankenstein (Ilona Massey), can help him. However, his quest to right himself puts him on a collision course with Frankenstein's monster (Bela Lugosi).

programme.title: The Frozen Ghost
programme.desc: When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum.","large":"When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum. Jealousy over the attention paid to his new co-worker causes mentally unbalanced sculptor Rudi Poldan (Martin Kosleck) to lash out at museum owner Valerie Monet (Tala Birell) and her niece Nina (Elena Verdugo) in a horrifying fashion.

programme.title: The Funhouse
programme.desc: Naughty teens (Elizabeth Berridge, Cooper Huckabee, Miles Chapin) are locked in a carnival fun house with a man in a Frankenstein mask.","large":"Rebellious teen Amy (Elizabeth Berridge) defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz (Cooper Huckabee), and their friends Liz (Largo Woodruff) and Richie (Miles Chapin). Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy Funhouse horror ride, the teens witness a murder by a deformed worker wearing a mask. Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

programme.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Shepherd Igor rescues the monster from a sulfur pit and brings him to Dr. Frankenstein's other son.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: House of Dracula
programme.desc: A scientist (Onslow Stevens) helps the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and Dracula (John Carradine), and revives Frankenstein's monster.","large":"This monster movie focuses on the iconic vampire, Count Dracula (John Carradine), and Lawrence Talbot (Lon Chaney), better known as the Wolf Man. Both beings of the night are tired of their supernatural afflictions, so they seek out Dr. Franz Edelmann (Onslow Stevens) for cures for their respective curses. While trying to aid the imposing creatures, Edelmann himself develops a transformative condition, adding to the many ghouls lurking around the foreboding landscape.

programme.title: House of Frankenstein
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked helper (J. Carrol Naish) revive Dracula, the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and the Frankenstein monster.","large":"After escaping from prison, the evil Dr. Niemann (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked assistant, Daniel (J. Carrol Naish), plot their revenge against those who imprisoned them. For this, they recruit the powerful Wolf Man (Lon Chaney), Frankenstein's monster (Glenn Strange) and even Dracula himself (John Carradine). Niemann pursues those who wrong him, sending each monster out to do his dirty work. But his control on the monsters is weak at best and may prove to be his downfall.

programme.title: House of Horrors
programme.desc: An insane sculptor sends the disfigured criminal he saved from drowning to kill the critics who denounced him.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: Exposure to a mysterious fog causes a man (Grant Williams) to shrink, making the world around him extremely hazardous.","large":"While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: The serum that makes a scientist (Claude Rains) invisible has madness as a side effect.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: A man (Vincent Price) framed for murder uses a serum to become invisible, then escapes to find the killer.","large":"Wrongly accused of murdering his brother, Geoffrey Radcliffe (Vincent Price) is found guilty and sentenced to die. But when sympathetic Dr. Griffin (John Sutton) injects him with a serum that renders him invisible, Radcliffe is able to escape and search for the real culprit. With Inspector Sampson (Cecil Kellaway) of Scotland Yard hot on his trail, Radcliffe begins to suspect that a recent hire in his family's mining company might have the answers he seeks.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: A criminal (Jon Hall) haunts his enemies' mansion after a mad scientist (John Carradine) makes him invisible.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: A scientist (Bela Lugosi) seeks an antidote for a radium-poisoned colleague (Boris Karloff) with the touch of death.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Bustin' Loose
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Richard Pryor) takes handicapped orphans and their teacher (Cicely Tyson) from Philadelphia to Washington state by bus.","large":"Parole officer Donald (Robert Christian) compels his foul-mouthed ex-con charge Joe Braxton (Richard Pryor) to escort a bus full of special education students from Philadelphia to the Pacific Northwest, where their teacher Vivian Perry (Cicely Tyson) plans to set up a new school. But when Braxton's latest attempt at going straight becomes a frustrating series of mishaps, he struggles to complete the job he was hired to do while resisting his growing affection for Vivian and the children.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: A minor-league pitcher (Richard Pryor) inherits $300 million but must spend $30 million in 30 days to get it.","large":"After losing his position as a minor-league pitcher, Montgomery Brewster (Richard Pryor) learns his great-uncle has left him $300 million. To inherit it, Brewster must spend $30 million in 30 days under a complicated set of rules that forbid him from donating too much to charity or retaining any new assets when the period is up. Unable to share details about the will's odd conditions with anyone, Brewster sets out to spend his money under the stern eye of paralegal Angela Drake (Lonette McKee).

programme.title: Mo' Better Blues
programme.desc: Music comes first for a Manhattan jazzman (Denzel Washington) with one too many lovers and a manager (Spike Lee) who gambles.","large":"Financially irresponsible Giant (Spike Lee) manages a jazz group, but his sax player, Shadow (Wesley Snipes), wants to replace him with a better businessman. Bleak (Denzel Washington), the band's trumpeter, then tries to defend his close pal Giant, leading to a power struggle between the two musicians. Meanwhile, as Bleak tries to straighten things out with his bandmates and manager, he also must choose to be with either sweet teacher Indigo (Joie Lee) or sultry singer Clarke (Cynda Williams).

programme.title: Major Payne
programme.desc: A Marine (Damon Wayans) with little understanding of civilians commands a group of young ROTC cadets and falls for a school doctor (Karyn Parsons).","large":"Maj. Benson Payne lives, breathes and sleeps war. But after being honorably discharged from the Marines due to a lack of wars, Payne, the natural-born killer, has absolutely no idea how to cope in everyday civilian life. Fortunately, before he completely breaks down, Payne finds his way back into a military capacity at Madison Preparatory School, leading a group of misfit JROTC students who don't want to be led. Whipping these kids into shape might be his toughest battle yet.

programme.title: Half Baked
programme.desc: Potheads (Dave Chappelle, Guillermo Diaz, Jim Breuer) sell marijuana to raise bail for a fellow stoner who accidentally killed a horse.","large":"When a member of their crew gets arrested for killing a New York City police horse by feeding it junk food, three slackin' stoners are forced to get off their butts and raise bail by selling pot stolen from a pharmaceutical lab. It's a risky plan but, hey, these are stand-up guys who would do anything to help out a friend in need.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: Joliet Jake (John Belushi) and Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd), brothers on a mission from God, bomb around Chicago in an old police car, reuniting their hot band.","large":"After his release from prison, Jake (John Belushi) reunites with his brother, Elwood (Dan Aykroyd) -- collectively known as the "Blues Brothers." Jake's first task is to save the orphanage the brothers grew up in from closing, by raising $5,000 to pay back taxes. The two are convinced they can earn the money by getting their old band back together. However, after playing several gigs and making a few enemies, including the police, the brothers face daunting odds to deliver the money on time.

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: A husband (Morgan Freeman) and wife (Diane Keaton) spend a hectic weekend pondering the sale of the apartment they've shared for more than 40 years.

programme.title: The Caveman's Valentine
programme.desc: Disturbing images haunt a mentally ill homeless man as he attempts to pin a youth's murder on a celebrated photographer.","large":"Romulus is a homeless man who dwells in a cave in one of New York City's parks, but was once a promising composer. When a boy is discovered dead on Valentine's Day, everyone assumes he froze to death, but Romulus believes he was murdered by noted photographer David Leppenraub. He struggles to convince everyone, including his police officer daughter -- but, inspired by hallucinations of his late wife, he eventually gets his chance to crack the case himself.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: In order to get a breather from their meddling sister-in-law (Gabrielle Union), three men pay a playboy (LL Cool J) $5,000 to romance her.","large":"Eva has been in charge of her younger sisters ever since their parents died, many years ago. Eva's uncanny ability to interfere in her sisters' affairs has not endeared her to their spouses and partners. The men would like to close out and divide up the family trust fund that Eva oversees. So they concoct a simple plan: compensate cash strapped ladies' man Ray Adams (LL Cool J) to romance and distract Eva from her familial duties. Sparks fly between Ray and Eva ... but the plan goes awry.

programme.title: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Long-forgotten rivalries and romances reignite when college friends (Morris Chestnut, Taye Diggs, Regina Hall) have a Christmas reunion nearly 15 years after the last time they saw one another.","large":"Nearly 15 years after they were last together as a group, college friends Lance (Morris Chestnut), Harper (Taye Diggs), Candace (Regina Hall), Quentin (Terrence Howard), Robyn (Sanaa Lathan), Jordan (Nia Long), Murch (Harold Perrineau), and Mia (Monica Calhoun) finally reunite over the Christmas holidays. Though much has changed in their lives, the friends discover just how easy it is for long-forgotten rivalries and passionate romances to be reignited.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A Black woman raises eyebrows among her friends when she develops a budding romance with a white man.","large":"Career-minded Kenya McQueen is set up on a blind date with architect Brian Kelly, but backs out when she realizes that he is white. Impressed with his work on a friend's mansion, McQueen hires Kelly to design her new garden -- and he sweeps her off her feet. But, after her friends introduce her to executive Mark Harper, McQueen must choose between the type of man she always dreamed she wanted and giving in to life's little surprises.

programme.title: Little
programme.desc: Jordan is a take-no-prisoners mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant and employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself.","large":"Jordan is a take-no-prisoners tech mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant, April, and the rest of her employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself right before a do-or-die presentation. Jordan will now need to rely on April more than ever -- if April is willing to stop treating Jordan like a 13-year-old child who has an attitude problem.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: Two people (Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin) discover that a TV commercial will cue a madman's (Dan O'Herlihy) Halloween masks to explode.","large":"Hospital emergency room Dr. Daniel "Dan" Challis (Tom Atkins) and Ellie Grimbridge (Stacey Nelkin), the daughter of a murder victim, uncover a terrible plot by small-town mask maker Conal Cochran (Dan O'Herlihy), a madman who's planning a Halloween mass murder utilizing an ancient Celtic ritual. The ritual involves a boulder stolen from Stonehenge, the use of Silver Shamrock masks and a triggering device contained in a television commercial -- all designed to kill millions of children.

programme.title: Child's Play 2
programme.desc: While Andy's mother is admitted to a psychiatric hospital, the young boy is placed in foster care, and Chucky, determined to claim Andy's soul, is not far behind.","large":"Two years after serial killer Charles Lee Ray (Brad Dourif) inserted his soul into a Chucky doll, a toy company attempts to re-create the doll, bringing Ray back in the process. The possessed doll, intent on claiming a human body, kills his way toward former owner Andy (Alex Vincent), who now lives in a foster home. Andy's foster sister, Kyle (Christine Elise), tries to protect him, but his foster parents believe Andy is just a troubled kid -- and Chucky's murderous path continues.

programme.title: Child's Play 3
programme.desc: Chucky returns for revenge against Andy, the young boy who defeated him, and now a teenager living in a military academy.","large":"It's been years since Chucky, the doll with the soul and the voice (Brad Dourif) of a psychopathic killer, was apparently destroyed in a fire at a doll factory. Now Chucky's manufacturer is remaking the same line of toys with the old, still haunted materials. This resurrects Chucky, who goes after Andy (Justin Whalin), his former owner, who now attends military school. Chucky slashes his way through a string of grotesque murders as Andy tries to stop the homicidal doll and the spirit within it.

programme.title: Curse of Chucky
programme.desc: Out for revenge, Chucky (Brad Dourif) the killer doll infiltrates the family of a woman, her sister and her young niece.

programme.title: Cult of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky returns to terrorize his human victim, Nica, who is confined to an asylum for the criminally insane. Meanwhile, the killer doll has some scores to settle with his old enemies, with the help of his former wife.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life.
